intended_use: The HealthFLD device is an image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis of the liver from CT images to support clinicians in the evaluation and assessment of Fatty Liv
intended_use_full: The HealthFLD device is an image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis of the liver from CT images to support clinicians in the evaluation and assessment of Fatty Liver. The HealthFLD software provides measurements of liver attenuation (mean HU in a region of interest). HealthFLD is indicated for use in non-contrast and contrast CT scans, with any clinical indication, for patients aged 18 up to 75. CTs must include a significant part of the liver. The HealthFLD device is not intended to provide a diagnosis or risk assessment of fatty liver disease.
ground_truth: Ground truth measurements determined by three US board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Overall agreement 95.98% (95% CI: [92.77%, 97.8%]) for binary classification <40HU versus ≥40HU; overall agreement 98.39% (95% CI: [95.94%, 99.37%]) for binary classification <50HU versus ≥50HU; Bland-Altman 95% limits of agreement [-7.80HU, 7.00HU]; 94.78% (95% CI: [91.24%-97.19%]) of differences within limits of agreement; overall agreement 95.98% for portal venous phase identification; 100% yield (250/250 cases returned results)
